channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: How passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship are quarantining in U.S. - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. How passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship are quarantining in U.S.  The Washington Post

  4. Last passengers leave virus-hit cruise ship as three more test positive  BBC
  5. Hantavirus: Current Situation  Centers for Disease Control and Prevention | CDC (.gov)

item.title: UK leader Starmer fights to save premiership as scores of Labour lawmakers urge him to resign - CNN
item.description:
1. UK leader Starmer fights to save premiership as scores of Labour lawmakers urge him to resign  CNN

item.title: South African president says he will not step down after impeachment call - BBC
item.description:

item.title: Nobel laureate Narges Mohammadi transferred to a Tehran hospital, her foundation says - NPR

item.description:

item.title: Israeli settlers force Palestinian family to exhume and rebury their father - NPR
item.description:
1. Israeli settlers force Palestinian family to exhume and rebury their father  NPR

  4. His father had just been buried. Then West Bank settlers forced him to dig up the body  BBC

item.title: Why is Putin now talking about the war in Ukraine ‘coming to an end’? - The Guardian
item.description:
